title: pyrus maia
intro: Pyrus maia, also known as Mayan plum or Mayan plum tree, is a deciduous tree species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The bark, leaves, and roots of Pyrus maia are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Pyrus maia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create supplements and topical treatments.
